sentences.arabic: الْبَرْمَجَةُ هِيَ لُغَةٌ جَدِيدَةٌ تُسَاعِدُنَا عَلَى التَّحَدُّثِ مَعَ الْحَاسُوبِ.
sentences.translation: Programiranje je novi jezik koji nam pomaže da razgovaramo s računarom.
sentences.translationEn: Programming is a new language that helps us talk to computers.

sentences.arabic: يَتَعَلَّمُ الطُّلَّابُ الْبَرْمَجَةَ فِي الْمَدَارِسِ لِبِنَاءِ الْمَوَاقِعِ وَالْأَلْعَابِ.
sentences.translation: Učenici uče programiranje u školama kako bi pravili web stranice i igre.
sentences.translationEn: Students learn programming in schools to build websites and games.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الْمَهَارَةُ تَفْتَحُ فُرَصَ عَمَلٍ كَثِيرَةً فِي السُّوقِ الْعَالَمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ova vještina otvara mnoge prilike za posao na globalnom tržištu.
sentences.translationEn: This skill opens many job opportunities in the global market.
